channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump's "Finish The Job" Warning To Iran Amid Peace Talks

media:content.media:description: Trump claimed that the US could destroy Iran's electricity and power generation facilities within hours.

item.description: Donald Trump on Monday said the United States would either reach a deal with Iran or "finish the job", while asserting that Washington has the capability to cripple Tehran's critical infrastructure if it chooses to do so.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump on Monday said the United States would either reach a deal with Iran or "finish the job", while asserting that Washington has the capability to cripple Tehran's critical infrastructure if it chooses to do so.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquake: Death Count Rises To 3,535, Over 16,700 Injured

media:content.media:description: The death toll from Venezuela's twin earthquakes has risen to 3,535.

item.description: The death toll from Venezuela's twin earthquakes has risen to 3,535, with more than 16,700 injured in the disaster, according to updated official figures released on Monday.
item.content:encoded: The death toll from Venezuela's twin earthquakes has risen to 3,535, with more than 16,700 injured in the disaster, according to updated official figures released on Monday.

item.title: Prince Harry Arrives In UK Amid Security Spat

media:content.media:description: Prince Harry arrived in Britain on Monday for a five-day visit.

item.description: Prince Harry arrived in Britain on Monday for a five-day visit expected to go ahead mostly without his wife and children after they were reportedly refused police protection.
item.content:encoded: Prince Harry arrived in Britain on Monday for a five-day visit expected to go ahead mostly without his wife and children after they were reportedly refused police protection.

item.title: Xi Jinping To Visit US In September, Says Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said on Monday that Chinese President Xi Jinping is expected to visit Washington in late September.

item.description: The President said the White House has struggled for decades to accommodate large state events, noting that the Executive Mansion currently lacks a dedicated ballroom.
item.content:encoded: The President said the White House has struggled for decades to accommodate large state events, noting that the Executive Mansion currently lacks a dedicated ballroom.

item.title: Mourners Throng Funeral Procession In Tehran For Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

media:content.media:description: Helicopter images aired on Iranian state television showed a massive crowd.

item.description: Khamenei's flag-draped coffin, and those of his family members who were killed Feb. 28 in an airstrike at the start of the war launched by Israel and the United States, sat aboard a truck decorated to resemble the ornamental grating that surrounds the shrine of an imam.
item.content:encoded: Khamenei's flag-draped coffin, and those of his family members who were killed Feb. 28 in an airstrike at the start of the war launched by Israel and the United States, sat aboard a truck decorated to resemble the ornamental grating that surrounds the shrine of an imam.

item.title: "Tricks": Israel Demands Hamas To Disarm After Group Dissolves Key Gaza Body

media:content.media:description: Hamas has said it will dissolve its Gaza governing body.

item.description: Israel has insisted on the full implementation of the US-brokered peace plan under President Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded: Israel has insisted on the full implementation of the US-brokered peace plan under President Donald Trump.

item.title: "Go Back To Your Country": Tensions Erupt At US Beach After Request Sparks Xenophobic Rant
item.description: The user revealed that the conflict began when a family approached a young man with a simple request: to pick up his trash.
item.content:encoded: The user revealed that the conflict began when a family approached a young man with a simple request: to pick up his trash.

item.title: Netanyahu Asks US Not To Sell F-35 Jets To Turkey Over "Power Balance"

media:content.media:description: The Israeli prime minister however warned it would be a mistake for Washington.

item.description: US President Donald Trump travels later Monday to Ankara for a NATO summit, and his visit could be seen by the Turks as an opportunity to secure acquisition of dozens of jet engines and potential readmission to the F-35 fighter jet program.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump travels later Monday to Ankara for a NATO summit, and his visit could be seen by the Turks as an opportunity to secure acquisition of dozens of jet engines and potential readmission to the F-35 fighter jet program.

item.title: Trump Rings Wall Street Opening Bell As He Ties Presidency To Market Gains

media:content.media:description: The S&P 500 stock index posted gains of 17.9 per cent in 2025.

item.description: Trump rang the bell as a symbolic act that reflects how he has increasingly tied his presidency to the stock market.
item.content:encoded: Trump rang the bell as a symbolic act that reflects how he has increasingly tied his presidency to the stock market.

item.title: India Helps Unlock Universe's Secrets, From God Particle To Dark Matter

media:content.media:description: India's association with CERN stretches back more than six decades

item.description: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.
item.content:encoded: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.

item.title: Hotel Faces Backlash For Keeping Dolphins In 'Shallow' Pool Originally Built For Guests
item.description: The animal rights group claimed that the animals spent time with tourists and were made to endure interactions with them throughout the day.
item.content:encoded: The animal rights group claimed that the animals spent time with tourists and were made to endure interactions with them throughout the day.

item.title: Police Officer Shot Dead In US Home While Responding To 911 Call

media:content.media:description: Ballinger said the 911 call came in at about 9:30 pm.

item.description: The suspect and two other people also died, and two other officers and a police dog were hurt, Wayne County Sheriff Tom Ballinger told reporters.
item.content:encoded: The suspect and two other people also died, and two other officers and a police dog were hurt, Wayne County Sheriff Tom Ballinger told reporters.

item.title: Korean Supertanker Tycoon Makes Millions On Secret Hormuz Shuttle Runs

media:content.media:description: Korean shipping tycoon profits from secret UAE oil tankers amid war

item.description: How a private Korean shipping magnate quietly built a supertanker empire and cashed in on the UAE's risky Hormuz oil shuttle runs
item.content:encoded: How a private Korean shipping magnate quietly built a supertanker empire and cashed in on the UAE's risky Hormuz oil shuttle runs

item.title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma's Message For Staff After Firing 3,200 Employees

media:content.media:description: Xbox has been losing 64 cents for every dollar it invested in a year.

item.description: In her email to workers, Sharma noted that 1,600 employees will be laid off on Monday, while the remaining ones will be let go over FY27.
item.content:encoded: In her email to workers, Sharma noted that 1,600 employees will be laid off on Monday, while the remaining ones will be let go over FY27.

item.title: India Closes Field Hospital In Venezuela After Earthquake Relief Mission

media:content.media:description: Many survivors and their families expressed their heartfelt gratitude.

item.description: According to the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), the Army Field Hospital provided timely medical assistance to the people of the country following the disaster.
item.content:encoded: According to the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), the Army Field Hospital provided timely medical assistance to the people of the country following the disaster.

item.title: American Man Sets World Record By Donating Over 30 Gallons of Blood Over Decades

media:content.media:description: Dan first donated blood in 1980 after his late brother encouraged him to try.

item.description: Dan Ryan from the USA, born on 1 November 1956, has donated over 30 gallons (113.562 litres) of blood to the Red Cross.
item.content:encoded: Dan Ryan from the USA, born on 1 November 1956, has donated over 30 gallons (113.562 litres) of blood to the Red Cross.

item.title: 50 Years On, Lead Pilot Remembers Hostage Rescue In Which Netanyahu's Brother Died

media:content.media:description: A file photo of Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu's elder brother.

item.description: In an exclusive interview with NDTV, Brig. Gen. Joshua Shani, the lead pilot who flew the mission, reflected on the planning, execution and enduring legacy of the operation
item.content:encoded: In an exclusive interview with NDTV, Brig. Gen. Joshua Shani, the lead pilot who flew the mission, reflected on the planning, execution and enduring legacy of the operation

item.title: UK Fighter Jets Intercept Russian Plane Near Aircraft Carrier

media:content.media:description: Military experts and European leaders say Russia has ramped up its "hybrid war" tactics.

item.description: A Russian patrol aircraft staged "unsafe" activity near the UK's flagship aircraft carrier as it conducted NATO air defence operations off Iceland, Britain's defence ministry said Monday.
item.content:encoded: A Russian patrol aircraft staged "unsafe" activity near the UK's flagship aircraft carrier as it conducted NATO air defence operations off Iceland, Britain's defence ministry said Monday.

item.title: 528-Bed ICE Facility Near Louisiana Airport Aims To Fast-Track Deportations

media:content.media:description: ICE's New 528-Bed Facility Raises Alarm Over Migrant Children

item.description: A private prison contractor will run the 528-bed site, which advocates warn could detain children far longer than ICE claims.
item.content:encoded: A private prison contractor will run the 528-bed site, which advocates warn could detain children far longer than ICE claims.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Iran Begins Ali Khamenei's Funeral Procession through Tehran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace
